log_events.summary: HADF Phase 2-bis Feature stub created; Block A scaffolding starts
Block A scaffolding complete; entering tasks phase

Sub-exp 1A closed PASS: silhouette 0.7003 at k=5 (+25.8% over Phase 2 baseline 0.5566), n_valid=2600 across 4-endpoint cloud matrix (gpt-4o-mini + gpt-4o + claude-haiku-4-5 + claude-sonnet-4-6), 14 fires over 2026-05-25T16:36Z to 2026-05-28T11:11Z, cost $0.324 actual vs $3-$4 nominal. Disarm at 2026-05-28T13:34Z via launchctl bootout. B13 -> done; B14 (Ollama llama3.2:3b) prep_in_progress with Saturday 2026-05-30 22:00 UTC scheduled arming.

Sub-exp 2 closed PASS: Ollama (llama3.2:3b on M2) streaming signature KS-distinguishable from BOTH Sub-exp 1 cloud anchors (openai/gpt-4o-mini + anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5) on BOTH metrics at p<<0.01 (ttft KS 0.94/0.98; tps KS 0.75/0.91). n_valid=800/900 (88.9% valid) vs 200 kill floor / 250 suggested pass-yield / 375 nominal expected. Medians: Ollama ttft 0.179s tps 43.8 vs openai 0.021s/65.4 vs anthropic 1.099s/83.3. 18 fires 2026-05-30T04:50Z to 2026-06-02T02:00Z, cost $0. Collection stopped via launchctl disable + plist Disabled=true. B14 -> done. B14.6 (case study §3.B) + B14.7 (snapshot) + B14.8 (PR) deferred to Block C synthesis (gated on B15 Sub-exp 3 Bedrock access).
